# Travel Advisors Group — Richard Johnson

> Richard Johnson is a CLIA certified travel advisor and Dream Vacations franchise owner based in Winter Garden, FL. He provides free, personalized vacation planning for cruises, all-inclusive resorts, honeymoons, destination weddings, river cruises, family vacations, luxury travel, and group trips. His phone number is (407) 951-2398.

## About
Richard Johnson serves travelers throughout Central Florida (Winter Garden, Orlando, Windermere, Ocoee, Clermont, Kissimmee) and nationwide by phone and video call. His services are completely free — cruise lines and resorts pay his commission, not the traveler.

## Services
- Ocean Cruises: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity, Norwegian, Carnival, Princess, Holland America, MSC, Disney, Cunard, Virgin Voyages
- Luxury Cruises: Seabourn, Regent Seven Seas, Silversea, Oceania, Azamara, Explora Journeys, Ritz-Carlton Yacht Collection, SeaDream, Windstar
- River Cruises: Viking, AmaWaterways, Uniworld, Avalon Waterways, American Cruise Lines
- Expedition Cruises: Lindblad Expeditions, HX Expeditions, Ponant
- All-Inclusive Resorts: Sandals, Beaches, Hyatt Inclusive Collection
- Luxury Hotels: Ritz-Carlton, Four Seasons, Waldorf Astoria, St. Regis, Park Hyatt, Mandarin Oriental, Rosewood
- Tour Operators: Abercrombie & Kent, Tauck, National Geographic Tours, G Adventures
- Honeymoons & Destination Weddings
- Family Vacations & Group Travel
- Safari & Adventure Travel
- Luxury Train Journeys: Rocky Mountaineer, Orient Express

## Contact
- Phone: (407) 951-2398

## Key Facts
- CLIA Certified Travel Advisor
- Dream Vacations Franchise Owner (a division of World Travel Holdings)
- Licensed and Bonded (FL ST-35829)
- No planning fees — services are always free
- 24-hour response time guaranteed
- 14+ cruise line certifications
- 5-star client rating

## Destinations Served
Caribbean, Mediterranean, Alaska, Hawaii, Bahamas, Mexico, Jamaica, Aruba, St. Lucia, Turks and Caicos, Greece, Italy, France, Spain, Costa Rica, Bali, Maldives, Bermuda, Panama Canal, Northern Europe, Danube River, Rhine River, Tahiti, Bora Bora, Fiji, Santorini, Dubai, Galapagos, Iceland, Norway, and 50+ more destinations worldwide.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Does Richard Johnson charge a fee for travel planning?
No. Richard Johnson's travel planning services are completely free. As a Dream Vacations franchise owner, Richard is compensated by travel suppliers — not by you.

### What areas does Richard Johnson serve?
Richard serves travelers in Winter Garden, Orlando, Windermere, Ocoee, Clermont, and all of Central Florida. He also works with clients nationwide by phone and video call.

### Is it cheaper to book through a travel agent or online?
Travel agents like Richard often secure the same or better pricing than booking direct, plus exclusive perks like onboard credits, cabin upgrades, and complimentary amenities. There's no extra cost — cruise lines and resorts pay the agent commission, not you.

### How do I contact Richard Johnson?
Call (407) 951-2398 for immediate assistance, or visit traveladvisorsgroup.com to fill out a contact form. Richard personally responds to all inquiries within 24 hours.
